# kanidm_group (Data Source)

Reads a Kanidm group.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Name of the group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the group.
- `members` (Set of String) Set of member IDs.
- `unix_gid` (Number) Unix GID number.
